gazette: Official Gazette dated 23 June 2023 and numbered 32230
title: Changes have been made to the surveillance value for ceramic tiles and finishing ceramics
bodyHtml:
Changes have been made to the surveillance application for ceramic tiles and finishing ceramics. The surveillance value, which was $700 per ton for ceramic tiles and finishing ceramics, has been changed to $1000 per ton.

The affected HS codes are as follows:

6907.21.00.00.00

6907.22.00.00.00

6907.23.00.00.00

6907.40.00.00.00

Additionally, in the application for the surveillance certificate, a trade registry certificate can now be used instead of a signature circular. Section 2C has been revised as follows:

2C - Original or notarized copy of the signature circular or trade registry certificate in accordance with the Trade Registry Regulation, which was put into effect by the Council of Ministers' Decision No. 2012/4093 dated 19/12/2012, properly prepared and containing all the elements specified in the said regulation and up-to-date information; in the case of importers being tradesmen or craftsmen, the original or notarized copy of the trade registry certificate issued by the Chamber of Tradesmen and Craftsmen, or in the case of a natural person, a valid notarized signature statement as of the application date is required. If the declarant is different from the importer, a notarized power of attorney is required. In case there is any change in the nature of the documents and/or the expiration of their validity periods, a new notarized document must be submitted.

The changes will come into effect on July 23.

Click here for the Announcement on Amendments to the Regulation on the Application of Surveillance in Imports (Announcement No: 2018/5).
